name: PanelMenu
description: PanelMenu is a hybrid of Accordion and Tree components.

props.name: expandedKeys
props.description: A map of keys to represent the expansion state in controlled mode.

props.name: multiple
props.description: When enabled, multiple root menuitems can be activated at the same time.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: panel-open
events.description: Callback to invoke when a panel gets expanded.

events.name: panel-close
events.description: Callback to invoke when an active panel is collapsed by clicking on the header.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Whether there is a root menuitem */ root: boolean; /** * Current active state of the menuitem */ active: boolean; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: PanelMenuRouterBindProps; /** * Whether or not there is a submenu */ hasSubmenu: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: submenuicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether item is active */ active: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: headericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: itemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]
